stdout:
"]
   345	    body = prompt
   346	    if prompt.startswith(sp): body = prompt[len(sp):].lstrip("\n")
   347	    try: r = subprocess.run(args, capture_output=True, text=True, timeout=timeout_s, input=body)
   348	    except subprocess.TimeoutExpired: log(ERR_LOG, "claude timeout"); return None
   349	    except Exception as e: log(ERR_LOG, f"claude spawn: {e}"); return None
   350	    with open(DEBUG_LOG, "a") as f:
   351	        f.write("===== " + time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S") + " =====\n")
   352	        f.write("RC:" + str(r.returncode) + "\nSTDOUT:\n" + (r.stdout or "")[:8000] + "\n\n")
   353	    out = (r.stdout or "").strip()
   354	    if r.returncode != 0: log(ERR_LOG, f"claude rc={r.returncode}: {out[:200]}"); return None
   355	    low = out.lower()[:300]
   356	    if "hit your limit" in low or "usage limit" in low:
   357	        log(ERR_LOG, f"claude rate-limited: {out[:200]}"); return None
   358	    return out or None
   359	
   360	
   361	def _post_reply_orig_protect(chat_id, text):
   362	    subprocess.run([SENDER, text, chat_id], timeout=60, capture_output=True, text=True)
   363	    try:
   364	        with open(OUTBOUND, "a") as f:
   365	            f.write(json.dumps({"ts": time.strftime("%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%S"),
   366	                "chat_id": chat_id, "text": (text or "")[:2000]}) + "\n")
   367	    except Exception: pass
   368	
   369	
   370	
   371	def post_reply(chat_id, text):  # BOT_PROTECTIONS_AIXA_V1 — redact known passwords first
   372	    return _post_reply_orig_protect(chat_id, _redact_passwords_protect(text))
   373	
   374	
   375	def process_line(line, idx):
   376	    try:
   377	        env = json.loads(line); body = json.loads(env.get("body", "{}"))
   378	    except Exception as e:
   379	        log(ERR_LOG, f"L{idx} parse: {e}"); return
   380	    if not is_actionable(body): return
   381	    chat_id = (body.get("conversation") or {}).get("id", "")
   382	    # BOT_PROTECTIONS_AIXA_V1 — intercept credentials before LLM call.
   383	    try:
   384	        _ut = strip_html(body.get("text","") or "") if "strip_html" in globals() else (body.get("text","") or "")
   385	        if _maybe_handle_creds_protect(_ut, chat_id, idx):
   386	            return
   387	    except Exception as _e:
   388	        log(ERR_LOG, f"creds-mw outer: {_e}")
   389	    if not chat_id: return
   390	    try: post_reply(chat_id, "🤔 *On it…*")
   391	    except Exception as e: log(ERR_LOG, f"L{idx} ack post: {e}")
   392	    prompt = build_prompt(body, env.get("context", []) or [])
   393	    reply = run_claude(prompt)
   394	    if not reply:
   395	        trimmed = prompt
   396	        if len(trimmed) > 8000:
   397	            trimmed = trimmed[:2500] + "\n[... earlier context omitted ...]\n" + trimmed[-5500:]
   398	        reply = run_claude(trimmed, timeout_s=180)
   399	    if not reply:
   400	        try: post_reply(chat_id, "⚠️ *Had trouble generating a reply — please retry in a moment.*")
   401	        except Exception: pass
   402	        return
   403	    if len(reply) > 3500: reply = reply[:3400] + "\n\n(…truncated)"
   404	    try: post_reply(chat_id, reply)
   405	    except Exception as e: log(ERR_LOG, f"post: {e}")
   406	
   407	
   408	def main():
   409	    log(DEBUG_LOG, "aixa-responder started")
   410	    pool = ThreadPoolExecutor(max_workers=2)
   411	    while True:
   412	        try:
   413	            offset = read_offset()
   414	            try:
   415	                with open(LOG, "r") as f: lines = f.readlines()
   416	            except FileNotFoundError: lines = []
   417	            if offset < len(lines):
   418	                to_process = lines[offset:]
   419	                write_offset(len(lines))
   420	                for i, line in enumerate(to_process, start=offset):
   421	                    pool.submit(process_line, line, i)
   422	            time.sleep(3)
   423	        except Exception as e:
   424	            log(ERR_LOG, f"main loop: {e}"); time.sleep(5)
   425	
   426	
   427	if __name__ == "__main__":
   428	    main()
